panels.A: H1 metrics with mean ±95% CI across seeds comparing proposed path against static and tri-state baselines.
panels.B: H3 false-positive/recall/enrichment trade-offs showing uncertainty-aware hybrid reranking gains.
panels.C: H4 multi-objective selection metrics (nondominated ratio, manufacturability pass, Jaccard stability).
panels.D: Symbolic+stress metrics (boundary ordering pass rate, counterexample failure rate, theorem assumption satisfaction).

variables.spearman_delta_rank_low_high: Rank correlation between high-vs-low activity deltas and target ordering.
variables.false_positive_rate_top30: Fraction of top-30 shortlisted candidates violating low-glucose safety target.
variables.nondominated_ratio_topK: Share of selected top-K points on the Pareto frontier under efficacy-safety-manufacturability objectives.

key_takeaways: Proposed selected path achieves >=0.10 Spearman gain vs static baseline for H1.
Hybrid reranking lowers top-30 false positives by >=25% with runtime within budget.
Pareto shortlist improves nondominated ratio and selection stability over scalar CAI baseline.
/app/outputs/runs/847300d1-9697-4153-969.uncertainty: Error bars are 95% confidence intervals computed over seed-level means (normal approximation with finite-sample standard error).

panels.A: Regime-stratified precision for low/normal/high glucose deciles under proposed policy and strongest baseline.
panels.B: Post-selection control analysis showing robustness-performance trade-off gaps across stress strengths.

variables.regime_precision: Precision among candidates satisfying safety+activity thresholds in each glycemic regime.
variables.tradeoff_gap: Difference between unconstrained and uncertainty-constrained utility under stress settings.

key_takeaways: Confirmatory analysis supports that gains persist across glycemic regimes, not only pooled averages.
Robustness penalties reduce performance volatility under strong counterexamples with bounded trade-off gap.
/app/outputs/runs/847300d1-9697-4153-969.uncertainty: Bands indicate bootstrap 95% CI over 1000 resamples of candidate subsets per regime.

confirmatory_analysis: Nested regime-stratified tradeoff analysis is descriptive and reported separately from acceptance-gated aggregate criteria.
